text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nearly all the classic year spring races are over,
and now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to see how well Mejiro Palmer's
awesomeness has come across so far.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ready, Palmster? ☆ Count down from three! Here
we go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right, bestie! Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: ZEROOO!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! We've got over 9,000! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! Wahey-hey! ☆彡

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By living free and running free, Mejiro Palmer has
managed to amass over 9,000 fans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, Helios! Thanks so much! I did it! I really,
actually did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: These fans of mine aren't just any old fans...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: After all, they started supporting me after I started racing as me, and not as a generic Mejiro Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oof, my palms are sweaty as heck! The vibes are
through the roof right now! I didn't even know I
could get this excited!
choice_data_list:
So how does it feel, doing what you heart tells
you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Not gonna lie, it's super nice having the freedom
to do whatever I want, but....

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's also hella scary! I mean, I'm on the hook each
time, whether I win or lose. I've caused problems
for people because of this too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Being able to make your own decisions for
yourself is way more responsibility than I thought
it'd be. The pain is real, but so's the fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But then it finally clicked, and I realized I've been
steering clear of making decisions ever since I was
a kid, just to try to protect myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I justified it by telling myself that I didn't have
enough talent anyway, so I shouldn't try to push
myself to do anything either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Except I didn't understand that there was no way I
could grow stronger unless I borrowed strength
from others and challenged myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And since I never challenged myself and just kept
talking my way out of tough choices, it's no
wonder I wasn't thriving in life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now, the script's totally flipped! I feel like a
little kid who isn't scared to say what she wants,
when she wants!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Starting now, I'm going to have a do-over and
relive the best years of my life! And this time, I
won't compare myself to anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, speak your truth, girlypop! ♪ Take back
those childhood days you lost! ★

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So, what's your first destination gonna be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Destination for what?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For your next race, of course! ☆ Where do wanna
go first to have your first totally free run?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're talking about my goal race, huh?
Hmm... I guess there are a lot in the summer and
fall.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Trainer! Peep this first before you choose the
race!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
A guidebook! ☆ We might as well get some
sightseeing in if we're gonna travel! You're
welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After looking through the guidebook, we have a
candidate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Hakodate Kinen. A summer G3 in Hokkaido,
huh?
choice_data_list: Should be a comfy enough run, don't you think?
Should be a comfy enough run, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's for sure way less pressure than with a G1
or a G2.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right. Now's the time for the three of us to
make our fresh start!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ★ Fresh start! Hokkaido, let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And let's eat a bunch of crab on Trainer's tab
while we're at it! ♪
choice_data_list: They don't catch crab in the summer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their nefarious plans to drain my savings,
a summer trip to Hokkaido does sound rather
refreshing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year and a fresh slate. The Hakodate
Kinen will be the first step on Mejiro Palmer's
new, independent road.
